ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was registered in the system */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the patient (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the patient (in kg) */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who performed the activity */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "seqn" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the activity */,
  "paxstat" INTEGER /* PAXSTAT value of the activity */,
  "paxcal" INTEGER /* PAXCAL value of the activity */,
  "paxday" INTEGER /* PAXDAY value of the activity */,
  "paxhour" INTEGER /* PAXHOUR value of the activity */,
  "paxminut" INTEGER /* PAXMINUT value of the activity */,
  "paxinten" INTEGER /* PAXINTEN value of the activity */,
  "paxstep" INTEGER /* PAXSTEP value of the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity (in minutes) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance covered during the activity (in meters) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity (in BPM) */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity (in kcal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the activity type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the activity type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location where the activity was performed (latitude,longitude) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used to record the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the patient
Date when the patient was registered in the system
Phone number of the emergency contact
ID of the patient who performed the activity
Distance covered during the activity (in meters)
